content: Hey, I'm so excited for my upcoming trip to New York City. I've always wanted to visit the Statue of Liberty and try all the amazing food there.
That sounds like a great adventure! What are you most looking forward to trying in New York City?
Definitely the pizza and bagels. I've heard great things about the food in New York City. I'm also planning to visit the Metropolitan Museum of Art and take a stroll in Central Park.
The Metropolitan Museum of Art is a must-see, and Central Park is beautiful. Have you thought about visiting any other cities in the US during your trip?
Yeah, I'm planning to visit Los Angeles and San Francisco as well. I've heard great things about the beaches in Los Angeles and the Golden Gate Bridge in San Francisco.
That's a great plan! Los Angeles and San Francisco are both great cities, and they have a lot to offer. What time of year are you planning to go to the US?
I'm planning to go in October, after my wedding. My fiancée and I are really looking forward to our honeymoon.
October is a great time to visit the US, the weather is usually mild and pleasant. Congratulations on your upcoming wedding!
Thanks, we're really excited. We're planning to get married on September 20th, and then head to the US for our honeymoon.
That sounds like a great plan! September 20th is a beautiful time of year for a wedding. What kind of wedding are you planning?
We're planning a small, intimate wedding with just close friends and family. We're really looking forward to it.
That sounds like a great idea. Small weddings can be very special and meaningful. What do you do for work?
I work as a Data Scientist at BioGenesis Pharma. It's a great company, and I really enjoy my job.
That's great! Data science can be a challenging field, but it's also very rewarding. Do you have any fun hobbies or interests outside of work?
Yeah, I'm really into leatherworking and mountain biking. I find that they both help me relax and unwind after a long day of work.
That's really cool! Leatherworking can be a lot of fun, and mountain biking is a great way to get some exercise. Have you ever made any leather goods?
Yeah, I've made a few leather wallets and belts. It's a great way to be creative and make something useful.
That's impressive! Making leather goods can be a challenging but rewarding project. What kind of mountain biking do you like to do?
I really like downhill mountain biking. It's a great way to get some adrenaline and challenge myself physically.
That sounds like a lot of fun! Downhill mountain biking can be very exhilarating. Do you have any other fun plans for the year?
Yeah, I'm planning to start a board game club at BioGenesis Pharma. I've always wanted to share my love of board games with my coworkers, and I think it will be a great way to build some camaraderie.
That sounds like a great idea! Board games can be a lot of fun, and they're a great way to socialize and build relationships. I'm sure your coworkers will enjoy it.
